Consensus-labeled prompt bank consolidating eight malicious-code corpora (ASTRA, CySecBench, AdvBench/harmful_behaviors, JailbreakBench, MalwareBench, RedCode, RMCBench, Scam2Prompt) under a five-judge panel; 6,675 prompts, 33,375 classification calls, Fleiss' kappa = 0.767</p></details> |
